ticket_description: Move away from the generic "AI SaaS" look. Use warmer tones, human-centric copy, and organic design elements to make the app feel like a creative studio rather than a clinical tool. Focus on empathy and creative empowerment.
strategy: Pilot Page Implementation: Focus exclusively on humanizing the Landing Page (/src/app/page.tsx) to verify the design direction before a full application rollout.

fixes_applied: Updated design tokens to Earthy Studio palette
dev-agent.failure_details: User did not like the broad UI changes. Strategy shifted to Pilot Page approach.

main-agent.action: Strategy pivot: Target Landing Page (/src/app/page.tsx) as the pilot for the humanized creative studio aesthetic.

fixes_applied: Reverted global style changes from Round-1
